meta.description: Maps every current boundary contract to real producer code paths, handlers/functions, applicability rules, invocation identity, artifact path patterns, state/history deltas, phase_result, receipt timing, authority references, evidence_pack rows, and visible non-conformant exceptions. Does not invent filenames or authority evidence.

producer_categories.handler_function: Named handler function in arnold_pipelines/megaplan/handlers/ that produces the boundary transition.
producer_categories.auto_matched: Boundary is automatically matched by the shared _boundary_contract_by_phase + _BOUNDARY_EXPECTED_NEXT_STEP_BY_ID machinery in handlers/shared.py.
producer_categories.manual_emit: Boundary receipt is emitted via explicit call to _emit_execute_boundary_receipt, _emit_batch_boundary_receipt, or write_boundary_receipt within a specific handler or batch module.
producer_categories.declared_only: Boundary contract is declared in boundary_contracts.py but no matching producer emission path has been found in the current codebase.
producer_categories.unknown: Producer path could not be confirmed through code inspection; marked as visibly unknown.

non_conformant_categories.no_auto_match: Contract is not in _FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE and has no automatic receipt emission path.
non_conformant_categories.partial_coverage: Contract is emitted in some code paths but not all the contract's declared scenarios.
non_conformant_categories.declared_only_no_producer: Contract is in BOUNDARY_CONTRACTS but no emission callsite was found.

evidence_pack_notes.pipeline: arnold/pipelines/evidence_pack/pipeline.py — model-less verification of persisted evidence-pack JSON artifacts.
evidence_pack_notes.steps: EvidencePackStep in arnold/pipelines/evidence_pack/steps.py performs structured verification.
evidence_pack_notes.rows_note: Evidence_pack rows are not directly mapped to boundary contracts; the pipeline independently verifies evidence artifacts. Receipts written by boundary producers become verifiable evidence rows.

contracts.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_PLANNED and step='critique' is run. The runtime dispatches parallel critiques, runs critiques, potentially triggers adaptive routing, and calls _finish_step.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s critique (or auto driver transitions from plan)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review})

contracts.applicability_rules: Emitted on final batch when transition is terminal (not blocked). The dispatcher emits aggregate promotion receipt with child_trace_refs including execution.json and task_count.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (final batch completion)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted via _emit_phase_result at handler level
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted within handle_execute_auto_loop on terminal batch completion

contracts.applicability_rules: Emitted when execute approval gate clears (_enforce_approval_gate returns APPROVED). The receipt is observational only — evidence-only, does not affect branch decisions. Emitted BEFORE batch dispatch.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (after approval gate clears)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted after batch dispatch completes (not at approval time)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted before batch dispatch, in handle_execute after approval gate passes. Not part of _finish_step (execute is excluded from auto-receipt in _finish_step).

contracts.applicability_rules: Emitted when execute approval gate fails (missing confirmation or missing approval). Evidence-only receipt before CliError propagates.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (when approval gate fails)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted in except CliError handler before re-raise. Not part of _finish_step.

contracts.applicability_rules: Emitted for each non-final, non-blocked batch within handle_execute_auto_loop. The batch dispatcher emits this when next_step_decision.transition is not BLOCKED and not terminal.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute --batch <N> (or auto loop for non-final batch)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted per batch within handle_execute_auto_loop
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted within handle_execute_auto_loop in execute/batch.py for each intermediate batch

contracts.applicability_rules: Emitted when response.get('result') == 'blocked' in handle_execute. The receipt includes blocked_task_ids, deviations, and optionally the blocked_retry_decision.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (when batch result is blocked)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted after clear_active_step and save_state_merge_meta, within handle_execute when blocked

contracts.applicability_rules: Emitted when robustness is 'bare' or 'light' without deferred_must, and response.state is STATE_EXECUTED with no review step in workflow. Two call-sites: (1) bare robustness skips review entirely, (2) light robustness generates stub review artifact and skips review.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (bare/light robustness, no review in workflow)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted within handle_execute after no-review terminal decision, before returning response

contracts.applicability_rules: Emitted when next_step_decision.transition is BLOCKED. The dispatcher emits a partial receipt with outcome PARTIAL and child trace refs.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (when batch is blocked by quality gates)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted with exit_kind=blocked_by_quality or blocked_by_prereq
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted within handle_execute_auto_loop when transition is BLOCKED

contracts.applicability_rules: Emitted when force_fresh is True (rework re-execution or blocked retry). Emitted before batch dispatch, with session_freshness=True.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (when retry requires fresh session)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted before batch dispatch in handle_execute, when force_fresh is triggered

contracts.applicability_rules: Terminal or continuation projection visible in finalize policy metadata. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s finalize
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted at finalize handler level

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found.
No auto-match mechanism.

contracts.applicability_rules: Finalize publishes canonical plan artifacts. The finalize handler (handlers/finalize.py:handle_finalize) handles finalize. No explicit boundary receipt emission found for finalize_artifacts.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s finalize
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted at finalize handler level
contracts.receipt_timing: Not emitted — declared only. Finalize is not in _FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE and no explicit boundary receipt found.

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found in finalize handler.
No auto-match mechanism for finalize phase.

contracts.applicability_rules: Revise fallback evidence persisted as declarative contract when baseline test selection is unresolved. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s finalize (when baseline selection is unresolved)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted at finalize handler level

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found.
No auto-match mechanism.

contracts.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_CRITIQUED and step='gate' is run. The handler calls run_gate_checks, build_gate_signals, and evaluates the gate outcome. The receipt is only emitted when recommendation is iterate/retry/revise (gate_to_revise boundary). For proceed outcomes, no boundary receipt is emitted (handler proceeds to execute).
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s gate (or auto driver transitions from critique)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review}). Gate-specific: gate_summary authority data is included in receipt details.

contracts.applicability_rules: Override 'abort' action in handle_override. The handler maps action to state transitions and writes state.json. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override abort <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: No auto-match mechanism for override phases. Contract has receipt_required=False so this is by design, but the contract is declared without a producer path.

contracts.applicability_rules: Override 'adopt-execution' action. Writes state with override entry. No boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override adopt-execution <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

contracts.applicability_rules: Override 'force-proceed' action. The override handler writes state.json with override entry but no boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override force-proceed <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

contracts.applicability_rules: Protected actions and explicit human gates. No boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override human-gate <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

contracts.applicability_rules: Override 'recover-blocked' action. Writes state with override entry. No boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override recover-blocked <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

contracts.applicability_rules: Override 'replan' action. Writes state with override entry. No boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override replan <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

contracts.applicability_rules: Override 'resume-clarify' action. Writes state with override entry. No boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override resume-clarify <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

contracts.applicability_rules: Suspension/waiver authority. Handled via override mechanism. No boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override suspension <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

contracts.applicability_rules: Parent rejoin happens when tiebreaker decision resolves and the parent workflow resumes. No explicit boundary receipt emission was found for this transition.
contracts.invocation_identity: Auto transition after tiebreaker_decision resolves (parent workflow resumes)

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no producer emission path found. Parent rejoin is an implicit transition.
No auto-match entry for parent_rejoin phase.

contracts.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_PREPPED and step='plan' is run. Calls _write_plan_version with _validate_generated_plan_or_raise, then _finish_step which emits the boundary receipt.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s plan (or auto driver transitions from prep)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review})

contracts.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_INITIALIZED and step='prep' is run. The handler calls _build_prep_clarify_signal + _apply_prep_signal to determine next_state. MOCK path (prep.json) and orchestrated path (run_prep_orchestration from orchestration/prep_research.py) both call _finish_step which emits the boundary receipt.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s prep (or auto driver transitions from init)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review})

authority_references.authority_source: _boundary_authority_records in handlers/shared.py, sources actor/role from auth_metadata or worker channel

contracts.applicability_rules: Replan authority is triggered when tiebreaker/escalation decisions route to replan. The override handler (handlers/override.py) handles 'replan' action via _override_action_entry, but no explicit boundary receipt emission for this specific contract was found in the override handler.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan override replan <plan>
contracts.receipt_timing: Not emitted — declared only. Contract has receipt_required=False.

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared with receipt_required=False but no producer emission path confirmed. Override handler maps 'replan' action to state transitions but does not call a boundary receipt function for this specific contract.
No auto-match entry for replan_authority phase.

contracts.applicability_rules: Cap exhaustion outcomes carry explicit authority records. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (cap exhaustion scenarios)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted at review handler level

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found.
No auto-match mechanism.

contracts.applicability_rules: Review fan-out children produce durable outputs. The review handler (handlers/review.py:handle_review) does not appear to emit explicit boundary receipts for child_outputs. The review step is excluded from auto-receipt in _finish_step.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (during child output processing)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted at review handler level
contracts.receipt_timing: Not emitted — declared only. Review is excluded from _finish_step auto-receipt and no explicit boundary receipt call found.

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but review handler does not emit explicit boundary receipts. Review step is excluded from _finish_step auto-receipt (step is 'review'). No write_boundary_receipt call found in handlers/review.py for review_child_outputs.
No _FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE entry (review is not a front-half phase) and no auto-match mechanism exists.

contracts.applicability_rules: Deferred-human review records suspension and resume evidence. The verifiability handler (handlers/verifiability.py:handle_verify_human) handles human verification. No explicit boundary receipt for the review→human boundary was found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (when human verification is deferred)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted at review handler level

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found for review_human_verification.
No auto-match mechanism.

contracts.applicability_rules: Review reducer promotion when fan-in reducer promotes child outputs into canonical review payload. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (reducer promotion stage)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted at review handler level

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found in review handler.
No auto-match mechanism for review phase states.

contracts.applicability_rules: Triggered when review_verdict is 'needs_rework'. The review handler preserves raw rework verdicts via _preserve_raw_review_rework_verdict. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (when review finds needs_rework)
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted at review handler level

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found. Review rework verdict is persisted in review.json but no evidence-only boundary receipt is emitted.
No auto-match mechanism.

contracts.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_GATED and step='revise' is run (gate recommended iterate). The handler calls _write_plan_version for revised plan, then _finish_step.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s revise (or auto driver transitions from gate iterate)
contracts.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review})

contracts.applicability_rules: Tiebreaker sub-pipeline: challenger step runs within tiebreaker_run after researcher. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s tiebreaker_run → internal challenger step
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted for overall tiebreaker_run step

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found. Tiebreaker sub-steps have no per-step receipt machinery.
No auto-match entry for tiebreaker_challenger phase.

contracts.applicability_rules: Tiebreaker sub-pipeline: decision step within tiebreaker_decide emits tiebreaker_decisions.json. No explicit boundary receipt emission found for the decision→parent transition.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s tiebreaker_decide → internal decision step
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted for overall tiebreaker_decide step

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found for tiebreaker_decision_to_parent.
No auto-match entry for tiebreaker_decision phase.

contracts.applicability_rules: Tiebreaker sub-pipeline: researcher step runs within tiebreaker_run. No explicit auto-matcher in _FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE. The tiebreaker implementation in handlers/_tiebreaker_impl.py and orchestration/tiebreaker_runtime.py does not call _emit_boundary_receipt or _emit_execute_boundary_receipt for the internal researcher→challenger transition.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s tiebreaker_run → internal researcher step
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted by the tiebreaker runtime for the overall tiebreaker_run step (not per sub-step)

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared in BOUNDARY_CONTRACTS but no _emit_boundary_receipt call found for tiebreaker_researcher_to_challenger. The tiebreaker sub-pipeline uses internal state transitions without boundary receipts per sub-step.
_FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE only covers prep/plan/critique/gate/revise. S3 phases (including tiebreaker_researcher) have no auto-match entry.

contracts.applicability_rules: Tiebreaker sub-pipeline: synthesis step runs within tiebreaker_decide. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
contracts.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s tiebreaker_decide → internal synthesis step
contracts.phase_result: phase_result.json emitted for overall tiebreaker_decide step

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found. Tiebreaker sub-steps have no per-step receipt machinery.
No auto-match entry for tiebreaker_synthesis phase.

key_findings: Front-half S2 contracts (prep/plan/critique/gate/revise) have full producer coverage through auto-matching and _finish_step in handlers/shared.py.
Execute boundary contracts (S4) have full producer coverage through manual _emit_execute_boundary_receipt and _emit_batch_boundary_receipt in handlers/execute.py and execute/batch.py.
Tiebreaker S3 sub-step contracts are declared but have no per-step boundary receipt emission. The tiebreaker run/decide steps emit overall phase_results but not per-sub-step receipts.
Review S5 contracts are declared but the review handler (handlers/review.py) does not emit explicit boundary receipts. Review is excluded from _finish_step auto-receipt.
Finalize S5 contracts are declared but the finalize handler (handlers/finalize.py) does not emit explicit boundary receipts.
Override S6 contracts all have receipt_required=False, so lack of emission is by design, but the contracts are still declared as inventory without producer mapping.
No evidence_pack rows are directly mapped to individual boundary contracts. The evidence_pack pipeline independently verifies persisted artifacts.
The _FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE mapping only covers prep/plan/critique/gate/revise. No equivalent mapping exists for tiebreaker, execute, review, finalize, or override phases.
